stemHtml: ATC: "G-ACZG, TURN RIGHT IMMEDIATELY SIXTY DEGREES TO AVOID TRAFFIC ELEVEN O'CLOCK FOUR MILES". What do you do?

options.a: Look for the traffic first, then acknowledge and turn.
options.b: Acknowledge, then check it's safe before turning.
options.c: Start a standard rate right turn onto the new heading immediately, and acknowledge.
options.d: Maximum bank immediately to complete the turn quickly.
